summary: Make the public template local-only, pinned, WSL-ready, and setup-aware
description: Make the public template local-only, pinned, WSL-ready, and setup-aware
acceptance: No GitHub Actions workflow remains and local Linux or WSL verification is the documented path
Bootstrap honors stack_ref and refuses an unverified runtime
A fresh template clone reports setup_required and passes a bounded local pairing acceptance

evidence.summary: RED: template contract failed while hosted workflow existed; commit-SHA bootstrap failed because git clone --branch cannot resolve a SHA. GREEN: local template test now proves setup_required, no workflow directory, matching pinned runtime, and immutable commit checkout. Full pairing verification follows after task state is moved from active to done.
